ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Continued To Apr-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Continued To Mar-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christy Styer for petitioner Otto Stelling, Jr.

Ms. Styer acknowledged that the petitioner was directed to file the petition for final distribution by today. She reported that the petition has been prepared and sent to the client, and that she is only awaiting the return of the signed verification at this point. She stated that the petition would be filed as soon as possible. The matter was continued to March 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christy Styer for Otto Stelling.

The Court noted that one of the gifts was made to a Minor. Ms. Styer stated that the person says she got it. The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration (subject to review of the order). Status on close of estate is set for February 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Continued To Dec-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christy Styer for Otto Stelling, Jr.

Ms. Styer stated that Otto has obtained amended receipts from his Children stating that they received $1,000.00 prior to the one year anniversary of their Grandfather's death, that she has no idea as to how payment was made to the minor and that she will file the receipts. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to December 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Continued To Nov-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Inventory And Appraisal And For Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Inventory And Appraisal And For Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Continued To Oct-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christy Styer for Otto Stelling, Jr. (Executor).

Ms. Styer stated that the inventory was filed on August 23rd, that an additional report has been sent out to the Referee for completion and that when she gets it back, she will be wrapping things up. Ms. Styer also stated that it could be more than four weeks due to complication as to the structure of the asset. The Court informed Ms. Styer that she needs to file a petition for approval of a status report. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to October 16, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Inventory And Appraisal And For Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Continued To Sep-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Inventory And Appraisal And For Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Continued To Aug-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christy Styer for Otto Stelling, Jr. (Executor).

Ms. Styer stated that she just received this case three weeks from Attorney Jack Leutza who passed away last month, that she is in touch with the Client to get the inventory and appraisal, that she can get the inventory over to the Probate Referee no later than next week and that she has to work with the Referee regarding inheritance tax. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal and close of estate is continued to August 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
